peirce_classification.firstness: Email apparently from president requesting confidential data; Return-Path spoofed to simsong@xy.dreamhostps.com
peirce_classification.secondness: Reply-To changes from alison@m57.biz (legitimate) to tuckergorge@gmail.com (malicious) between consecutive emails; Alison genuinely confused by Jean's reply
peirce_classification.thirdness: Attacker performed spear-phishing with hierarchical identity spoofing to induce exfiltration of employees' financial and personal data

null_hypothesis: Jean acted in good faith following standard client service procedure; the email appeared legitimate and came from her direct superior
scoring_notes: M57-Jean. Live dataset but solutions are everywhere. Practice only. Useful for Reply-To / spear-phishing detection dev.
